• Full‑screen canvas game with mobile D‑pad, action buttons, chat, minimap, and customizable UI.
  • Procedural world generation, mining with drill tiers, AOE, explosives, teleporters, inventory, shop, and admin host system.
  • Audio mixer, graphics quality, key‑binding UI, autosave, cloud sync, and custom texture import.
    Game.init()
    Sound.init()

This HTML defines a mining sandbox with responsive controls, multiplayer via MQTT, and extensive UI components for settings, shop, dashboard, and admin tools. It includes procedural terrain, mining mechanics, inventory handling, and a modular modal system for prompts and trades. The page adapts to mobile, offers custom textures, and saves progress locally and to the cloud.
